title: East Blue Conquered
safeRecap: A rubber-limbed dreamer and his scrappy crew of misfits officially mapped their path to the Grand Line. Across peaceful villages and brutal pirate strongholds, they forged an unbreakable bond, defied a corrupt justice system, and made a legendary vow atop a fateful barrel before braving the wildest sea.

title: Desert Kingdom Liberated
safeRecap: Plunging into the treacherous currents of the Grand Line, the crew navigated prehistoric jungles and winter blizzards to reach a divided desert nation. Against a shadowed crime syndicate and an untouchable Warlord, they pushed beyond their mortal limits to save a desperate princess and halt a bloody civil war.

title: Golden Bell Rung
safeRecap: Chasing an impossible dream ridiculed by the surface world, the pirates rode a legendary vertical current into a perilous realm above the clouds. Facing a self-proclaimed god of lightning and his ruthless enforcers, they ignited a fierce rebellion to end a centuries-old feud and ring a mythical golden bell.

title: World Government Defied
safeRecap: Internal fractures and failing ships threatened to completely tear the crew apart in the world's greatest metropolis of shipwrights. When shadowed assassins kidnapped one of their own, the pirates waged an uncompromising war against a global superpower's supreme stronghold, cementing their absolute devotion and bringing a devastating rescue mission to a miraculous close.

title: Morning Sun Secured
safeRecap: Wandering into a dense, haunted sea of eternal fog, the crew became trapped upon an island-sized ship ruled by an undead Warlord. Stripped of their very shadows, they endured a harrowing, nightmare-fueled night to defeat a gigantic ancient warrior and reclaim the stolen dawn before the morning light incinerated them completely.

title: Ultimate Toll Paid
safeRecap: Catastrophic defeat completely shattered the crew, scattering them across the vast world while their captain plunged alone into the deepest pits of hell. A desperate, large-scale infiltration exploded into a historic clash of titans that altered the very fabric of the pirate era, leaving a devastating heartbreak and a solemn vow for the future.

title: Deep Ocean Awakened
safeRecap: Reunited after two grueling years of relentless training, the crew descended thousands of leagues beneath the sea into a breathtaking underwater paradise. Confronting a bitter legacy of racial hatred and fanaticism, they unleashed their dramatically upgraded powers to protect the royal family and shatter an extremist uprising in the ocean depths.

title: False Idols Toppled
safeRecap: Entering the savage New World, a chaotic pirate alliance led the crew through hazardous volcanic facilities and straight into a glamorous, deceitful kingdom of toys. Toppling an underworld kingpin required clashing with fierce gladiators, rallying a massive fleet of unlikely allies, and dismantling a tyrannical conspiracy that held an entire nation hostage.

title: Emperor's Territory Breached
safeRecap: A harrowing detour to a ruined elephant island revealed an impending betrayal, forcing a dangerous stealth mission into the colorful, terrifying domain of a reigning Emperor. Fighting desperately to retrieve a kidnapped crewmate, they crashed a deadly underworld wedding, shattered invincible illusions, and barely escaped the wrath of an unstoppable armada.

title: Dawn of Wano
safeRecap: Reunited in a closed-off land of samurai and immense pollution, the crew plotted a massive uprising against a seemingly indestructible dragon. Two Emperors joined forces in a world-shaking raid on a floating fortress, pushing the captain to an unbelievable awakening that finally shattered two decades of agonizing tyranny and darkness.

title: Future Island Escaped
safeRecap: The crew's voyage led them straight into a futuristic, government-controlled laboratory island ruled by the world's greatest scientific genius. What began as a technological marvel rapidly erupted into absolute chaos as hidden histories were broadcast globally, forbidden truths emerged, and the highest planetary authorities descended to extinguish the light forever.
